Final Fantasy X GameShark Codes

Below are GameShark codes for Final Fantasy X on PlayStation 2.

Infinite HP

1456E7A8 0000270F
2456E7AC 000003E7

Infinite MP

1456E7B0 0000270F

Max Gil

0456D120 05F5E0FF

Quick Level Up

9012ABCD EF345678
1234ABCD 0000FFFF

Some surrounding prose that should never be detected as a cheat code. Enjoy the game!
